gates.required_evidence: Two phones using wifi-direct-only; peer discovery succeeds; selected route is wifi-direct; message delivery and route attempts are captured.
gates.gap: Repeated Xiaomi to Samsung Wi-Fi Direct route-delivery evidence is captured, and P2P-bind diagnostics show bidirectional ping plus shell TCP works while remote TCP to Kraken app listeners still times out. Bidirectional app delivery and route-bound negative tests are not proven.

gates.required_evidence: Unknown peer, wrong recipient, duplicate/replay, TTL and malformed packet rejection captured while Wi-Fi Direct is the active route.
gates.gap: Current hostile counters are debug-local and not Wi-Fi Direct radio-path negative evidence.

gates.required_evidence: Android A -> Mac -> Android B physical LAN forwarding for normal/drop/duplicate/tamper with before/send/relay/after artifacts.
gates.gap: Physical Mac -> Android B forwarding and attack modes are not proven.

gates.required_evidence: LAN/BLE/Wi-Fi Direct external malformed, unknown, wrong-recipient and duplicate cases reach phone listeners and increment rejection counters.
gates.gap: LAN injector writes timed out; BLE/Wi-Fi Direct external injection is not captured.

gates.required_evidence: N-run two-device benchmark with minimum sample gate met for every claimed route; median, p95, loss and retry reported.
gates.gap: Existing LAN/BLE samples are n=2 per route; 2026-06-11 two-device runner preflight produced zero delivered latency samples and remains insufficient for reliability claims.

gates.required_evidence: Release-like builds fail while prototype crypto, placeholder identity and unsigned QR remain research-only.
gates.gap: Production security remains separate and open.

gates.required_evidence: Keystore identity, signed QR, reviewed encrypted packet envelope, release signing and security review.
gates.gap: Production secure messenger is roadmap-only and must not be claimed.

gates.required_evidence: Experimental profile metadata flows through QR/relationship/session/packet; weak/mismatch/native-unavailable blocked; standard profile is not Adamova-claimed.
gates.gap: Not a production crypto security claim.

gates.required_evidence: Route-specific LAN/BLE two-phone prototype evidence with counters and claim boundary.

commands.wifi_direct_route_capture: scripts/capture_debug_route_evidence.sh --device R5CY22X6MSB --device d948ffd0 --label wifi-direct-repeatability-check --transport-profile wifi-direct-only --reuse-running-mesh --debug-send-body "wifi-direct repeatability check" --sync-after-debug-send --sync-attempts 8

claim_boundary: Completion-control artifact only. It does not claim production security, production reliability or completed 10/10.
